creator: laszlo-rdr-keethu9thi@karolyi.hu
text:
(In reply to km from comment #25)
A quick remark, you probably have installed luadbi when it had already removed mysql dependency, since it was breaking compilation and thus the port.

Then the compilation breakage was fixed on behalf of luadbi, so the original mysql dependency was added back. That must have broken your installation.

Just to clarify the timeline here.

I've already commented on the related bugreport.
